general: Internship Opportunity: Data Scientist / ML Engineer Intern
Position: Data Scientist / ML Engineer Intern
Department: AI / Machine Learning / Data Science
PPO Opportunity: Yes – Based on Performance
• Computer Science / AI-ML / Data Science / Statistics
• Preferred from IITs, NITs, IISERs, and Top Engineering Institutes
We are looking for passionate and research-oriented Data Scientist / ML Engineer Interns who are
eager to work on real-world AI and Machine Learning problems.
This internship offers hands-on exposure to Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, NLP ,
predictive analytics, and intelligent product development.
Interns will work closely with AI, Product, Engineering, and Analytics teams on live AI-powered
responsibilities: • Assist in building and training Machine Learning models.
• Work on AI/ML-based business use cases and intelligent systems.
• Perform data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model optimization.
• Analyze structured and unstructured datasets for insights.
• Support development of predictive and recommendation models.
• Work on NLP and Generative AI-related projects.
• Assist in model evaluation, testing, and deployment workflows.
• Collaborate with engineering teams for AI integration into products.
• Participate in research, experimentation, and AI innovation initiatives.
• Explore AI automation and scalable ML pipeline development.
skills: • Participation in Kaggle, research, or AI competitions is preferred.
Candidates should have basic understanding of:
• AI APIs and AI-assisted development tools.
• Responsible AI and ethical AI fundamentals.
• Passion for AI, ML, and emerging technologies.
• Curiosity to solve real-world business problems using AI.
• Hands-on exposure to AI/ML and Generative AI projects.
• Opportunity to work on live intelligent product development.
• Exposure to modern AI technologies and scalable ML systems.
• Mentorship from experienced AI and Engineering teams.
• Potential full-time opportunity based on performance.
